title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat with local models, embed documents, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Run and chat with local LLMs from Node or the browser.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama. Use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). Chat interface, model management, RAG, multi-user support.

title: continue
summary: VS Code & JetBrains plugin that adds Ollama-powered code completion, inline chat, and highlighting explanations.

title: llamafile
summary: Mozilla’s single-file executable LLM runner that can load Ollama-compatible GGUF models with no install.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA, chat and embeddings in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like agent that uses Ollama local models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama REST API asynchronously.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal Flask/React chatbot template that connects to a local Ollama instance for private conversations.

title: ollama-nvidia-rtx
summary: GitHub discussion thread tracking native Windows GPU (CUDA) support for Ollama on RTX cards.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB to chat with local PDFs and notes.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience wrapper adding fzf model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates to the ollama CLI.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Nginx, and GPU support for easy deployment.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and both sync/async APIs for .NET 6+.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Rust backend + React frontend) with tray icon and auto-launch.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets a server chat with an Ollama model privately or in threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and persistent model storage.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated list of 100+ community-uploaded GGUF models (Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, etc.) pullable via `ollama pull`.
